# Coverage table: row-uniform quotient-row ledger (generated by qrl_verify.py S3)

Scales are M = 2^j, dyadic, 2 <= M <= t = (n-k)/2. n' = n/M.

RULE (verified exhaustively at probe points):
- n' <= 32 (j >= s-5, the top FOUR scales): PROVED, all cells (T1).
- n' >= 64 (j <= s-6): PROVED on a <= 6, a >= n'-6 (T1) and
  a^2 > (k'-1)n' (T2); OPEN exactly on the band
  a in [max(k'+1,7), min(n'-7, isqrt((k'-1)n'))], nonempty everywhere.
- M > k (rho = 1/8: M = 2k; rho = 1/16: M in {2k,4k}): claim does not
  parse (k/M non-integral); class-level priced by T1 (n' <= 8) and T3
  (class <= n/M).
- Own-band (P1) reading: the single cell a = k'+1; open iff k' >= 8,
  i.e. every open scale except (rho = 1/16, n' = 64), where k'+1 = 5 <= 6.

| s | rho | open scales | proved scales | open a-band at extremes |
